part1.question: Do you like music?
part1.followUp: What kind of music do you enjoy?

part1.question: Can you play a musical instrument?
part1.followUp: Would you like to learn one?

part1.question: Do you prefer live music or recorded music?
part1.followUp: Have you been to a concert recently?

part1.question: How has music streaming changed the way people listen to music?
part1.followUp: Do you think physical albums will disappear?

part2.cueCard: Describe a skill you would like to learn.
bulletPoints: Why you want to learn it
How you plan to learn it
Explain how it might benefit you
followUpQuestions: Do you think people should learn new skills throughout their lives?
What is the best way to learn a new skill?
How has technology changed the way people learn?
